xprotectd(8) System Manager's Manual xprotectd(8)

NAME

xprotectd — XProtect Daemon

SYNOPSIS

xprotectd [-v]

DESCRIPTION

xprotectd is a subsystem of XProtect, a component of MacOS which automatically detects and blocks the execution of known malware.

FILES

/System/Library/LaunchDaemons/com.apple.security.xprotectd.plist
The launchd.plist(5) for xprotectd.

SEE ALSO

securityd(8), endpointsecurityd(8),

December 9th, 2025 Darwin
